title: Aerospace Propulsion Adaptive Controller
description: A low-cost closed-loop cold-gas propulsion controller for a 1U CubeSat testbed. An STM32/Arduino-class MCU reads IMU angular rates and tank pressure, runs a cascaded PID attitude controller, and modulates solenoid valve pulse widths to null attitude errors. A five-state fault-detection FSM monitors valve current, pressure drop anomalies, and IMU residuals; on fault it transitions to safe-hold and logs fault codes to EEPROM. ΔV budget is tracked in real time using the Tsiolkovsky equation with measured propellant consumption.
objective: Achieve <2 deg steady-state attitude error under 0.01 N·m disturbance torque, log all thruster firings and faults to non-volatile memory, and demonstrate automatic safe-hold on injected fault within 100 ms.
constraints: MCU: Arduino Mega / STM32F103 BluePill (<=5 USD). Propellant: CO2 cartridge 12 g, max 60 bar — relief valve limits system to 6 bar operating. Total BOM < 40 USD. No explosive propellants. Watchdog reset within 500 ms. Factor of Safety >= 2 on all pressure-bearing fittings.
supporting_fact_titles: Cold-Gas Thruster Dynamics and Pulse-Width Modulation Control
Fault Detection and Isolation in Embedded Propulsion Controllers
design_element_titles: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
Cold-Gas Solenoid Valve Driver with Current Sensing

element_usage_notes.ICM-42688-P High-Rate IMU via SPI: Reads roll/pitch/yaw rates at 1 kHz; feeds inner rate loop of cascaded PID. Angular rate residual used by FDI to detect unexpected rotation after commanded firing.
element_usage_notes.Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controlle: Outer loop: attitude error (deg) → rate setpoint. Inner loop: rate error (deg/s) → PWM pulse width for valve. Rate loop runs at 500 Hz, attitude loop at 50 Hz.
element_usage_notes.Cold-Gas Solenoid Valve Driver with Curr: Fires +Z thruster valve on positive roll error, −Z valve on negative. Current sense confirms valve opened; stuck-open/closed triggers FSM fault transition.
element_usage_notes.Tank Pressure Sensor Interface — MPRLS/M: Sampled every 10 ms; pressure drop per firing pulse fed into Tsiolkovsky mass-flow model to track remaining ΔV budget. Low-pressure alarm at 1.5 bar.
element_usage_notes.Fault-Safe Propulsion State Machine: Wraps entire control loop. Transitions to FAULT on: over-pressure, IMU loss, valve stuck, watchdog. All events EEPROM-logged with millis() timestamp.

element_interactions.to: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: IMU feeds both loops of the cascaded PID at 500 Hz over SPI.

element_interactions.from: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.to: Cold-Gas Solenoid Valve Driver with Current Sensing
element_interactions.description: PID inner loop outputs PWM pulse width and selects +Z or −Z solenoid valve.

element_interactions.from: Cold-Gas Solenoid Valve Driver with Current Sensing
element_interactions.description: INA219 current reading confirms valve actuation; fault flag sent to FSM on anomaly.
Tank pressure and derived ΔV budget fed to FSM; low-pressure or over-pressure triggers state transition.

element_interactions.to: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: FSM enables or inhibits PID output to valves; SAFE_HOLD zeroes all valve commands immediately.
